nasb.text: Now it came about, when men began to multiply on the face of the land, and daughters were born to them,

esv.text: When man began to multiply on the face of the land and daughters were born to them,

cnv.text: 人在地上開始增多，又生養女兒的時候，

ccb.text: 人类在地上逐渐增多，生了女儿。

csbs.text: 当时，人在地面上开始增多，生了很多女儿，
